name: Planfile
summary: Manage planfile tickets and run planfile DSL through task:// and planfile:// URI commands.
description: Planfile exposes a project's planfile backlog as URI commands: list/next/show tickets, create tickets, transition ticket status (start/complete/fail/block/ready), and run planfile DSL. Routes operate on a project directory and execute out-of-process through the compiled registry.
useCases: List or pick the next runnable ticket from a planfile sprint.
Create and transition planfile tickets from NL-to-URI workflows.
Run planfile DSL commands against a project directory.
